Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Represents an NGO activity, project, or drive conducted by Sarthak.

description.description: A brief overview description of the activity

details.description: Detailed multi-paragraph description of the activity

imageUrl.description: The cover image URL for the activity

imageUrls.description: List of gallery images for the auto-changing slideshow

category.description: The category, e.g., Education, Food Relief, Healthcare

date.description: The date the activity was conducted

goalReached.description: A highlight badge representing target impact reached

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when this document was created

JoinSubmission.title: JoinSubmission
JoinSubmission.description: Represents a form submission from a user wishing to join Sarthak as a volunteer.

ContactSubmission.title: ContactSubmission
ContactSubmission.description: Represents a standard contact form message submitted on the website.

activities.description: Public and admin-managed records of NGO activities.

join_submissions.description: Volunteer application submissions, managed by admins.

contact_submissions.description: General user contact and query submissions, managed by admins.
